meanings.meaning: 有事业心的，有进取心的，有开拓精神的
meanings.usage: 用来形容人有创新能力、愿意尝试新方法来获得成功

meanings.meaning: 不加选择的，杂乱的；交配随意的
meanings.usage: 可指行为没有选择性，也可指生物繁殖时没有固定配偶
指毫无约束的随性状态，常用搭配with abandon
指主动丢弃、离开原本的人或事物
指大量生物迅速蔓延占领某个区域，常用被动语态be overrun with/by
指大面积的严重破坏，程度较强
指动物在地下挖洞穴居住
特指兔子、狐狸等动物挖的地下洞穴
集合名词，指可作为牲畜饲料的草本植物总称

meanings.meaning: 易受影响的，易感染（疾病）的
meanings.usage: 常用搭配be susceptible to sth.，指对某种疾病或影响没有抵抗力

meanings.meaning: 传染病，流行病；（坏事的）泛滥，盛行
meanings.usage: 指在某一地区大范围传播的疾病，也可指不良现象的普遍蔓延

meanings.meaning: 带菌者，传播媒介；运输工具
meanings.usage: 医学上指携带病原体、会传播疾病的生物或物体
用来强调变化的程度非常大、速度非常快
指彻底杀光某一整个群体的生物，对象通常是害虫、有害动物等
可以指遗嘱中遗留财产，也可指历史上留下的事物（多为负面）

meanings.meaning: 瘟疫，疫病（致命的流行性传染病）
meanings.usage: 文学或正式用语，指致死率极高的大范围传染病
形容动物经过人类培育，不再适合野外生存

phrases.usage: 表示“肆意地，放纵地”，用来描述行为毫无约束、随心所欲的状态

examples.en: The tourists cheered with abandon when the parade began.
examples.zh: 游行开始时，游客们尽情欢呼。

examples.en: Children were splashing in the water with complete abandon.
examples.zh: 孩子们毫无顾忌地在水里嬉闹泼水。

phrases.usage: 表示“易受…影响，易感染…（疾病）”，to为介词，后接名词或动名词

examples.en: People with weak immune systems are more susceptible to the flu.
examples.zh: 免疫系统较弱的人更容易感染流感。

examples.en: Teenagers are often susceptible to peer pressure.
examples.zh: 青少年往往容易受到同伴压力的影响。

phrases.usage: 表示“摆脱，除去，处理掉”，后接不需要的人或事物

examples.en: We need to get rid of all the old furniture in the apartment.
examples.zh: 我们需要把公寓里所有的旧家具都处理掉。

examples.en: It took me a month to get rid of my cough.
examples.zh: 我花了一个月时间才治好咳嗽。

phrases.usage: 表示“充当，担任，起…作用”，后接表示身份、功能的名词

examples.en: She agreed to act as our interpreter during the trip.
examples.zh: 她同意在旅行期间充当我们的翻译。

examples.en: The lemon juice acts as a natural preservative for the jam.
examples.zh: 柠檬汁在果酱里起到天然防腐剂的作用。

phrases.usage: 表示“把…传递给，把…传染给”，强调物品、疾病或信息的传递

examples.en: Please pass this message on to all the team members.
examples.zh: 请把这条消息传达给所有团队成员。

examples.en: The virus can be passed on to others through close contact.
examples.zh: 这种病毒可以通过密切接触传染给其他人。

phrases.usage: 表示“在…的范围之内，在…的边界内”，confine常用复数形式表示界限、限制

examples.en: All the activities will take place within the confines of the campus.
examples.zh: 所有活动都将在校园范围内进行。

examples.en: He felt trapped within the confines of his boring daily routine.
examples.zh: 他觉得自己被困在枯燥的日常琐事的牢笼里。

phrases.usage: 表示“被认为是，被看作是”，是被动语态结构，用来表达人们对事物的普遍看法

examples.en: This novel is regarded as one of the greatest works of the 20th century.
examples.zh: 这部小说被认为是20世纪最伟大的作品之一。

examples.en: In many cultures, the tiger is regarded as a symbol of courage.
examples.zh: 在很多文化中，老虎被看作是勇气的象征。

phrases.usage: 表示“…的基础”，常用搭配be the basis of/for sth.

examples.en: Mutual trust is the basis of a good relationship.
examples.zh: 相互信任是良好关系的基础。

examples.en: The research was done on the basis of hundreds of interviews.
examples.zh: 这项研究是在数百次采访的基础上完成的。

grammar.title: so that引导的结果状语从句
grammar.definition: 用来表示主句动作所产生的结果，通常翻译为“因此，所以，结果是”
grammar.structure: 主句 + so that + 结果状语从句
grammar.usage: 说明主句行为带来的直接后果，从句和主句之间存在明确的因果关系，从句前通常有逗号和主句隔开

examples.en: This rabbit had no natural enemies in the Antipodes, so that it multiplied with that promiscuous abandon characteristic of rabbits.
examples.zh: 这种兔子在澳新地区没有天敌，因此就像兔子的特性那样，不加节制地大量繁殖。

examples.en: I forgot to take my keys, so that I had to wait outside until my mom came back.
examples.zh: 我忘了带钥匙，所以只好在外面等到我妈妈回来。

examples.en: He left home very early, so that he caught the first train without any trouble.
examples.zh: 他很早就出门了，因此毫不费力地赶上了第一班火车。

grammar.title: 非限制性定语从句
grammar.definition: 对先行词进行补充说明，去掉之后不影响主句的完整意思，通常和主句之间用逗号隔开
grammar.usage: 可以修饰前面的某个名词，也可以修饰整个主句的内容，不用that引导

examples.en: It spread through France, where wild rabbits are not generally regarded as a pest but as a sport and a useful food supply.
examples.zh: 这种疾病传遍了法国，在那里野兔通常不被看作是有害动物，而是狩猎娱乐的目标和有用的食物来源。

examples.en: The old house, which was built 100 years ago, is still in good condition.
examples.zh: 这座老房子建于100年前，现在状况仍然很好。

examples.en: Our guide, who was born in the nearby village, knew all the best hiking routes.
examples.zh: 我们的向导出生在附近的村子，知道所有最好的徒步路线。

grammar.title: it作形式主语的主语从句
grammar.definition: 当主语是较长的从句时，为了避免句子头重脚轻，用it作形式主语放在句首，真正的主语从句放在句子后面
grammar.structure: It + be + 形容词/名词 + that + 真正的主语从句
grammar.usage: 常见的形容词有obvious, apparent, clear, possible, strange等，用来表达“…是很明显/可能的”

examples.en: It later became apparent that rabbits were developing a degree of resistance to this disease.
examples.zh: 后来人们发现，兔子对这种疾病逐渐产生了一定的抵抗力。

examples.en: It is important that we should finish the task before the deadline.
examples.zh: 我们要在截止日期前完成任务，这一点很重要。

examples.en: It is a pity that you missed the wonderful concert last night.
examples.zh: 你错过了昨晚那场精彩的音乐会，真可惜。

sentencePatterns.pattern: Ironically, + 主句 + which引导的非限制性定语从句, + 谓语 + 结果

original.en: Ironically, Europe, which had bequeathed the rabbit as a pest to Australia, acquired this man-made disease as a pestilence.
original.zh: 讽刺的是，把兔子作为有害动物传给澳大利亚的欧洲，反而染上了这种人造的瘟疫。

imitations.en: Ironically, the library, which was supposed to encourage people to read more, closes on weekends when most people are free.
imitations.zh: 讽刺的是，本应鼓励人们多读书的图书馆，在大多数人有空的周末却闭馆。

imitations.en: Ironically, the invention, which was designed to make people closer, makes many of us communicate less face to face.
imitations.zh: 讽刺的是，这项本为拉近人们距离而设计的发明，反而让我们很多人更少面对面交流了。

sentencePatterns.pattern: The question became one of whether + 从句

original.en: The question became one of whether Man could control the disease he had invented.
original.zh: 问题演变成了人类能否控制自己发明的这种疾病。

imitations.en: The problem became one of whether we can raise enough money for the project.
imitations.zh: 问题演变成了我们能否为这个项目筹集到足够的资金。

imitations.en: The discussion became one of whether we should change our original plan at the last minute.
imitations.zh: 讨论演变成了我们是否应该在最后一刻改变原定计划。

sentencePatterns.pattern: Sth. did not, however, remain within the confines of + 范围

original.en: It did not, however, remain within the confines of this estate.
original.zh: 然而，这种疾病并没有停留在他的庄园范围内。

imitations.en: The small conflict did not, however, remain within the confines of the two villages.
imitations.zh: 然而，这场小冲突并没有局限在两个村子的范围内。

imitations.en: The good news did not, however, remain within the confines of the small office.
imitations.zh: 然而，这个好消息并没有只在这个小办公室里流传。

sentencePatterns.pattern: There were hopes, however, that + 同位语从句

original.en: There were hopes, however, that the problem of the rabbit would become manageable.
original.zh: 不过，人们还是有希望认为兔子的问题会变得可控。

imitations.en: There were hopes, however, that the missing hiker would be found before dark.
imitations.zh: 不过，人们还是有希望在天黑前找到失踪的徒步旅行者。

imitations.en: There were hopes, however, that the local government would take measures to reduce the air pollution.
imitations.zh: 不过，人们还是有希望当地政府会采取措施减少空气污染。
